blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Ensure that options can be added or removed after the initial launch without disrupting existing workflows.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of adding/removing options after launch, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case describes a scenario where an owner renames a label, there is no concrete evidence that demonstrates the ability to add or remove options post-launch. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process, as the requirement was not directly supported by the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of validation for adding/removing options after launch.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for adding/removing options
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that options can be added or removed after the initial launch without disrupting existing workflows.
